functions.name: ble_write
functions.description: Write data to a BLE GATT characteristic (with response).

args.name: data
args.description: Data to send to the peripheral (string or byte array)

args.name: len
args.description: Maximum number of bytes to write

functions.name: ble_write_no_response
functions.description: Write data to a BLE GATT characteristic (without response).

args.name: data
args.description: Data to send to the peripheral (string or byte array)

args.name: len
args.description: Maximum number of bytes to write

functions.name: get_system_config
functions.description: Read a system configuration value by key.

functions.name: set_system_config
functions.description: Write a system configuration value by key.

functions.name: get_plugin_config
functions.description: Read a value from the calling plugin's own configuration.

args.name: default
args.description: Default value if key not found

returns.description: Configuration value (type depends on stored value)

functions.name: set_plugin_config
functions.description: Write a value to the calling plugin's own configuration.

args.name: value
args.description: Value to set (int, float, or string)

functions.name: delay
functions.description: Pause plugin execution for a given number of milliseconds.

functions.name: log
functions.description: Log a message to the device console. Accepts a string or integer argument. The plugin name is prepended for identification.

args.name: msg
args.description: Message or integer value to log

functions.name: random
functions.description: Generate a random integer using the hardware RNG. With 0 args returns a raw uint32. With 1 arg returns [0, arg). With 2 args returns [arg0, arg1].

args.name: min
args.description: Lower bound (or upper bound if only one arg)

returns.description: Random integer in the specified range

functions.name: millis
functions.description: Get milliseconds elapsed since device boot. Uses esp_timer_get_time() (microseconds) divided by 1000.

events.name: mode_set
events.description: Fires when the active operating mode changes.

events.name: speed_change
events.description: Fires when the motor speed changes.

events.name: arousal_change
events.description: Fires when the arousal level changes.

events.name: orgasm_denial
events.description: Fires when an orgasm is denied (edge detected).

events.name: edge_start
events.description: Fires when edging starts (near-orgasm detection begins).

events.name: connect
events.description: Fires when a BLE peripheral connects.

events.name: disconnect
events.description: Fires when a BLE peripheral disconnects.

events.name: tick
events.description: Fires on each main loop tick (periodic heartbeat).
